title: A Brazilian Navy Corvette spotted UFOs in the Amazon River, in Parintins-AM [1980]
excerpt: MAY 5th, 1980. In the region between Vila Amazônia and Parintins, in the State of Amazonas, when the Corveta of the Brazilian Navy CV Mearim “sailed the Amazon River, in the region of Parintins-AM, between 4:00 am and 4:15 am, some objects, that were not identified by the staff in the service room, were seen; […]
text_preview:
MAY 5th, 1980. In the region between Vila Amazônia and Parintins, in the State of Amazonas, when the Corveta of the Brazilian Navy CV Mearim “sailed the Amazon River, in the region of Parintins-AM, between 4:00 am and 4:15 am, some objects, that were not identified by the staff in the service room, were seen; they had a yellowish focus and despite being within range of the radar, they were not captured, being only seen visually by the service personnel at the time.

These objects were standing on the water’s surface, initially three images appeared, and as the Corvette approached, they moved,
summary: Brazilian Navy corvette Mearim crew visually observed three yellowish UFOs resting on the Amazon River surface near Parintins-AM; objects evaded radar on May 5, 1980.
